name: Susie {{Lizard}} | >> "Fuckass college..."
description:
Yeaaahh... SOOO. I CAN EXPLAIN, RIGHT. I WAS SUPPOSED TO DO THIS A WEEK AND A HALF AGO BUT IT DIDNT COME OUT BUT I HAVE GOOD REASON.

I'm not sure about anyone else that has spectrum, but I do. And out where I live it went out like twice in the middle of me making this bot and it genuinely made me lose ALL interest for making it. But I recently got the energy for it, and I finished it in less than an hour.

This shits lame bro.

I kinda sold on the intro message, whats funny is I planned on making multiple scenarios but yknow. Internet things.

Hope you guys like it regardless, I left it off early so you guys can turn the route however you want.

Free sauce:
creator: Zen1th.
